name: Arvin Dalvilu
bio:
Physical Appearance: Dunmer (Dark Elf) male wearing ordinary lower-class clothing - a brown shirt with light brown linens and pigskin shoes. Wields an iron shortsword.
Race: Dunmer
Personality Keywords: reclusive, idle, solitary
Role: Arvin Dalvilu is a farmer residing in Bleaker's Way, a small village in the Great Forest. He appears to be the ne'er-do-well of the Dalvilu clan.
Home Location Information: His house in Bleaker's Way. The dwelling is more or less empty except for a huge stash of beverages and only a humble bedroll to sleep on.
Daily Routine: Arvin wakes at 6am and picks up one of the many bottles from the floor, spending the next two hours breakfasting. The rest of the morning and all afternoon is spent lazily strolling around his house. At 6pm he takes a breath of fresh air outside until returning to his house at 8pm, then continues his idle routine until bedtime.
Clan Relations: Arvin practically never socializes, setting him apart from the rest of the Dalvilu clan. His sparse living conditions and drinking habits mark him as something of an outcast within his own family.
Personality - The Idle Drinker: Arvin lives a solitary existence, spending his days drinking and wandering aimlessly through his nearly empty home. He keeps to himself and avoids interaction with his clan and the other residents of Bleaker's Way. His lifestyle suggests someone who has withdrawn from the community and responsibilities expected of him.
author: Bethesda
